Sybase uses a power minus root line.
The total time sums all three parts line.
We substitute the query shares into each line.
The total function becomes a sum of terms line.
Minimization requires finding partial derivatives for line.
Setting derivatives to zero gives optimal values line.
Numerical methods solve these complex equations for line.
